title: spartium scoparium var. albiflorum
intro: Spartium scoparium var. albiflorum, also known as the white broom, is a variety of the broom tree that is native to the Mediterranean region and is characterized by its white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of white broom include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote digestive health. Herbal preparations of white broom can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and gastrointestinal disorders.
